description.description: Defines the description for the resource policy, providing context or details about its purpose. Maximum length is 255 characters.

disk_consistency_group_policy.description: Defines the consistency group policy for disks, ensuring data integrity during snapshots; requires specifying parameters for resource group management.

group_placement_policy.description: Defines the placement policy for instances in the group, specifying constraints such as colocation or distribution across zones.

instance_schedule_policy.description: Defines the schedule for instances, specifying start and stop times in UTC for automated instance management.
instance_schedule_policy.type: list(object({expiration_time: optional(string),start_time: optional(string),time_zone: string,vm_start_schedule: list(object({schedule: string})),vm_stop_schedule: list(object({schedule: string}))}))

name.description: Name of the resource policy, must be unique within the project and region.

snapshot_schedule_policy.description: Defines the configuration for the snapshot schedule, including frequency, retention policy, and other settings for automated disk snapshots.
snapshot_schedule_policy.type: list(object({retention_policy: list(object({max_retention_days: number,on_source_disk_delete: optional(string)})),schedule: list(object({daily_schedule: list(object({days_in_cycle: number,start_time: string})),hourly_schedule: list(object({hours_in_cycle: number,start_time: string})),weekly_schedule: list(object({day_of_weeks: list(object({day: string,start_time: string}))}))})),snapshot_properties: list(object({chain_name: optional(string),guest_flush: optional(bool),labels: optional(map(string)),storage_locations: optional(list(string))}))}))

timeouts.description: Defines the timeout duration for operations on the resource policy, specifying limits for creation, update, and deletion processes.
